what_it_is: A deterministic, LLM-free 8-stage Python pipeline that turns messy decision backlogs (form rows, chat forks, audit findings, agent questions, markdown bullets) into a reduced founder-review sheet plus a validation-gated apply-map. Each stage emits a JSON receipt. Its stated thesis is "the form is not the product, the machine is the product" — it normalizes raw statements, rewrites jargon to plain English, checks terminology against the sibling language_gate dictionary, clusters duplicates, classifies each item into MACHINE_VALIDATABLE / ADVISOR_REVIEW / FOUNDER_FACT / DEFER, and only presents advisor clusters + founder facts to the founder while machine-closing the rest.

current_state.note: Runs end-to-end via `python3 dlm_v1.py <input>`; 8 committed sample runs exist under output/ and receipts/ (committed Jul 8 2026, commit 4ad2f5c). It is a working v1 but rule-based: clustering (THEME_RULES) and classification (FOUNDER_FACT/DEFER/ADVISOR/MACHINE_EVIDENCE pattern lists) are hardcoded regex tuned to one founder corpus, so it won't generalize to new corpora without editing those lists. Two hard couplings/caveats: (1) dlm_terms_v1.py imports the OUT-OF-SCOPE sibling language_gate/ (language_gate_core_v1.py + dictionary_index.json) for the dictionary check — that dependency exists on disk and resolves; (2) committed output manifests carry a stale absolute path (/Users/.../Desktop/Noetfield-Systems/...) from an earlier machine, so old artifacts are cosmetically stale though the code recomputes paths correctly at runtime. The apply-map stage is deliberately fenced: it never auto-submits FORM_OFFICIAL and blocks on unvalidated advisor/founder picks unless partial_batch is on.

key_assets.purpose: argparse entry point; flags --validated-picks, --skip-apply-map, --no-partial-batch, --json; calls run_pipeline
orchestrates the 8 stages in order, writes a stage receipt per stage plus founder_sheet/processed/apply_map/manifest outputs, returns summary dict

canonical dataclasses (DecisionItem, ProcessedItem, Cluster), ItemSource enum, CLASSIFICATIONS + STAGES constants, run-id/receipt/manifest writers (write_stage_receipt, write_run_manifest), OUTPUT_DIR/RECEIPTS_DIR

normalizes 4+ input shapes (form open_questions, backlog items/decisions/rows JSON, FORM_OFFICIAL markdown sections, plain markdown bullet lines) into DecisionItem list; load_items() dispatches by suffix/content
jargon rewrite pass; JARGON_REPLACEMENTS + ACRONYM_EXPAND tables, option simplification, 45-word/320-char truncation

term extraction + dictionary check; imports language_gate_core_v1 allowlists/TERM_RE/load_dictionary; emits per-term status DICTIONARY_OK / ALIAS_RETIRED / RETIRED / DICTIONARY_FIX_NEEDED and a fix_needed flag
keyword-scored clustering into 12 hardcoded THEME_RULES buckets (+ CLUSTER-OTHER / CLUSTER-FOUNDER-FACT / CLUSTER-DICT-FIX fallbacks); merges member questions and controls
ordered pattern cascade classifying each item into FOUNDER_FACT / DEFER / MACHINE_VALIDATABLE / ADVISOR_REVIEW with a reason + evidence_hint; four regex pattern lists drive it
builds the reduced founder sheet (advisor clusters + founder facts only, machine/deferred as id lists) as JSON and renders markdown via render_founder_sheet_md
validation fence: load_validated_picks parses multiple pick formats; build_apply_map produces READY/EMPTY/BLOCKED_UNVALIDATED, lists machine_closed_without_founder, never auto-submits FORM_OFFICIAL
80-item FORM_OFFICIAL open-questions corpus (primary fixture; produces 10 advisor clusters, 38 machine-validatable, 2 founder facts)
small mixed-source corpus (audit_finding, chat_fork, agent_question, backlog) exercising every intake path
per-stage receipt store: {run_id}.{stage}.{scan_id}.receipt.json, one per stage per run (schema decision_language_machine_stage_receipt_v1)

extension_points: dlm_plain_english_v1.py: JARGON_REPLACEMENTS list + ACRONYM_EXPAND dict — add domain jargon/acronym rewrites without touching pipeline wiring
dlm_cluster_v1.py: THEME_RULES list of (cluster_id, name, keywords) — append new decision themes; assign_cluster/build_clusters pick them up automatically

dlm_classify_v1.py: the four pattern lists (FOUNDER_FACT_PATTERNS, MACHINE_EVIDENCE_PATTERNS with hints, DEFER_PATTERNS, ADVISOR_PATTERNS) — tune routing by editing regex; classify_item cascade is fixed but data-driven
dlm_intake_v1.py: add a from_<source>() loader and wire it into load_items() suffix/content dispatch to support new input formats (CSV, JSONL, receipt streams)
dlm_core_v1.py: STAGES tuple + write_stage_receipt() — insert a new pipeline stage and it inherits receipt/manifest plumbing for free
dlm_founder_sheet_v1.py: render_founder_sheet_md() is the render seam — add render_founder_sheet_html() (or other formats) reading the same sheet dict
dlm_apply_map_v1.py: load_validated_picks() format handlers + SKIP_KEYS — add new validated-pick input schemas without changing the fence logic
language_gate/dictionary_index.json (out of scope, read by dlm_terms_v1.py) — dictionary entries flow directly into DICTIONARY_FIX_NEEDED / ALIAS_RETIRED / RETIRED statuses

buildable_ideas.idea: Add render_founder_sheet_html() beside render_founder_sheet_md() in dlm_founder_sheet_v1.py and have the pipeline also write output/{run_id}.founder_sheet.html — a single self-contained page showing advisor clusters, options, founder facts, and the machine/deferred counts. Directly satisfies the founder's standing rule that 'presentation' means a simple HTML page, not a deck.
buildable_ideas.builds_on: dlm_founder_sheet_v1.py (render_founder_sheet_md + build_founder_sheet dict), dlm_pipeline_v1.py sheet-writing block

buildable_ideas.idea: Build dlm_eval_v1.py: a golden-fixture harness that adds an expected_classification (and expected cluster) field per item in the test fixtures, runs the pipeline, and diffs actual vs expected classification counts/labels, emitting an eval receipt. Turns the hardcoded regex classifier into something regression-testable before anyone tunes the pattern lists.
buildable_ideas.builds_on: dlm_classify_v1.py cascade, test_fixtures/*.json, write_stage_receipt in dlm_core_v1.py

buildable_ideas.idea: Add a DICTIONARY_FIX_NEEDED batch emitter stage that aggregates every DICTIONARY_FIX_NEEDED / ALIAS_RETIRED / RETIRED term across all items into output/{run_id}.dictionary_batch.json as a proposal file (proposed canonical entries + source item ids) — proposal only, never writing to language_gate/dictionary_index.json. The 80-item fixture already surfaces 62 fix-needed items, so this closes the biggest bucket of open work.
buildable_ideas.builds_on: dlm_terms_v1.py check_terms statuses + dictionary_flags, dictionary_fix_needed counts already in the pipeline

buildable_ideas.idea: Extend classify_item to record which rule fired (cluster-forced vs which named pattern vs default-defer) and a confidence tier, surfaced in processed.json and flagged on the founder sheet so low-confidence DEFER/ADVISOR items are visibly 'guessed'. Makes the opaque regex cascade auditable and tells the founder where the machine is least sure.
buildable_ideas.builds_on: dlm_classify_v1.py ordered cascade (classification_reason/evidence_hint already exist), dlm_founder_sheet_v1.py rendering

buildable_ideas.idea: Write an apply-map round-trip validator (dlm_verify_apply_map_v1.py) that loads an emitted apply_map.json + the source backlog and asserts the invariants: every ADVISOR_REVIEW/FOUNDER_FACT id is either in picks or missing_ids, machine_closed_without_founder never overlaps picks, and status is never a FORM_OFFICIAL auto-submit — emitting a verification receipt. Hardens the one governance fence in the whole subsystem.

Add a from_jsonl()/from_csv() intake adapter and wire it into load_items() suffix dispatch so backlogs exported as line-delimited rows (a common form/agent export shape) flow through unchanged. Extends reach without touching any downstream stage.
